name: Linguini with Limas and Mustard
recipeIngredient: 2 cups baby lima beans, frozen, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the lima beans, scallions, and mustard in vegetable broth for about 7 minutes while the pasta is cooking.
2. Add the seeded tomatoes to the simmering mixture and remove from heat.
3. Toss the cooked linguini with the sauce.
